text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Oguri! Don't you dare lose to Super Creek!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Inari! You can do it! You're the best of the best in
the Eternal Top Three!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At some point, the world decided the
representatives of this generation's Umamusume
are Oguri Cap, Super Creek, and Inari One—the
"Eternal Top Three."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And now, those three are vying for the throne at
the autumn Tenno Sho under the gaze of all of
Japan...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the waiting room before the autumn Tenno
Sho, Sakura Chiyono O takes a deep, quiet
breath, then opens her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ever since summer camp, I've been thinking about
how I can keep running past my peak.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen said that even if she's past hers, she'll
continue to run as she is.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I knew what was happening, but that didn't mean
I had to take it lying down! So I kept fighting and
fighting until I felt like myself again.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I may not be the same "me" that I was before, but
I can say with pride that I'm no lesser racer.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
After what Maruzen and my precious rivals said to
me, I made up my mind.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I needed to accept my weaknesses. To stop trying
to hold the breaking pieces together, and just let
them shatter.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
If they're not going to fall back in place, then I'll
run with all I've got left... and break the
deadweight off myself.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh, no. I don't mean that I'm going to hurt myself!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ever since we talked about my peak, I've been
scared that I'll continue to deteriorate.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But if I let go of who I was, maybe I'll find who I'm
going to be. A stronger me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: It's quite forward-thinking, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, please keep your eyes on me. I want you
to witness the moment of my rebirth.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hehe, glad to hear it. Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I look at Sakura Chiyono O, who has managed
to get back on her feet, I think about how truly
blessed she is with incredible rivals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not only does she have Mejiro Ardan and Yaeno
Muteki, she also has Maruzensky, whom she
adores so much.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Mr. Trainer. This is something only racers
can comprehend. Just like there are some things
only our supporters can understand.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Ms. Trainer. This is something only racers
can comprehend. Just like there are some things
only our supporters can understand.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Compared to them, I wonder if I was able to give
her any kind of meaningful support at all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Compared to her fellow competitors, I'm...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: "I'm the pot, and you're the ladle"!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
A pot and a ladle have different jobs, but you
need both to make a delicious chanko hot pot!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: All righty. Here I go, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's wrong?
choice_data_list: I'll support you with everything I've got.
I'll support you with everything I've got.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thank you. Watch me run, then, okay?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And keep being there to push me forward... just
like you always have.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho is here! Some incredible
racers have gathered for this race!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Among the lineup is the Eternal Top Three—Oguri
Cap, Super Creek, and Inari One!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(Those three are incredibly talented and
extremely powerful Umamusume.)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(But I'm not going to lose, no matter who my
opponents are. And of course... that includes
myself.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It's been a while since we've seen each other on a
G1 stage. Not since the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ardan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Chiyono. You're aiming for an even bigger
miracle than I was before, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Still, I won't hand victory over so easily today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I'm your rival, after all.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The same goes for me. I will race you with all my
strength.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And I look forward to seeing what we will all have
gained after the dust from this battle settles.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm so grateful to have you both as my rivals.
Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But the desire to win is still strong in my heart, so
here I come!
